segments.text: He's going to knock it out of riddles now.
He's got to get it done the hard way.
And one thing Light is doing that I think was really smart,
and just as soon as I say it, he's going to eat.

full_text: He's going to knock it out of riddles now. He's got to get it done the hard way. And one thing Light is doing that I think was really smart, and just as soon as I say it, he's going to eat. Oh, no. Are you kidding? No. You're gone. You missed, and you died.
